justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time and date preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent engaged in multiple avoidable round-trips by simply stating unavailability and then asking the user for a new time or date.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's repetitive responses and failure to offer alternative solutions, leading to a tedious and unproductive interaction.
